findings.description: Knowledge file description reads `ボタン用の共通テンプレートタグ` (テンプレート) but the source says `ボタン用の共通テーンプレートタグ` (テーンプレート). The knowledge file silently corrects what appears to be a source typo, but the text no longer matches the source.
findings.source_evidence: button:base | ボタン用の共通テーンプレートタグ

findings.description: Knowledge file uses `部署一覧・部品表など` (middle dot ・) but the source uses `部署一覧、部品表など` (Japanese comma 、). The punctuation was changed without basis in the source.
findings.source_evidence: table:treelist | 部署一覧、部品表など、階層化されたデータの一覧を表示する

findings.description: 22 widget names (first-column property names from the table) are absent from hints: button:base, button:cancel, button:check, button:confirm, button:delete, button:download, button:search, button:update, column:code, column:label, column:link, field:base, field:block, field:example, field:hint, field:label, field:label_block, field:label_code, field:label_id_value, tab:group, tab:link, table:plain.
findings.source_evidence: Source table lists 42 widgets; hints include only 20 of them.
